stemHtml: A crew calculate speeds for a take-off using 15° of flap but, due to distraction, perform the take off with flaps fully retracted. Choose the correct statement.

options.a: With better acceleration, the risk of a tail strike or stall is reduced.
options.b: With better acceleration, runway used on take-off will be less.
options.c: The aircraft may remain on the ground after rotation.
options.d: Once safely airborne, climb performance is reduced.
